entries.title: Page edit preview actions.
entries.waitFor: button[title="Preview current unsaved changes without saving"], button:has-text("Changes")
entries.notes: Capture the Page edit header with the Preview group showing the separate `Changes` and `Live page` actions.
entries.useCase: An editor chooses between a temporary unsaved preview and the saved public page.

entries.title: Signed unsaved page preview modal.
entries.click: button[title="Preview current unsaved changes without saving"], button:has-text("Changes")
entries.notes: Optional until the Capell screenshot runner supports sequential clicks inside grouped Filament actions. The current Capell UI keeps `Changes` inside the visible `Preview` action-group dropdown, so the runner must first open that group and then click the hidden action.
entries.useCase: An editor reviews temporary Page changes before saving them through the real Peek modal.

entries.title: Expired preview error.
entries.notes: Optional until the Capell screenshot runner can mint temporary signed route URLs during capture. The state must show the safe expired/missing snapshot error without exposing cache keys or internal exception details.
entries.useCase: An editor understands that an old temporary preview link has expired.
